description: Suggestion rules: first matching category wins (except critical is always keep). Prefixes match package name start.

categories.label: Critical (Samsung / telephony)
categories.reason: Removing can break calls, mobile data, IMS, or home screen. Only change with a known replacement.

categories.label: Social — Meta / Facebook
categories.reason: Facebook / Meta preinstall stubs; often removed on debloat lists if unused.

categories.label: Samsung Galaxy Store
categories.reason: App store; removing blocks Galaxy Store installs/updates for Samsung apps.

categories.label: Browser-related (Samsung + Chrome)
categories.reason: Samsung Chrome customization; safe if you do not rely on it. Does not replace uninstalling Chrome/Samsung Internet themselves.

categories.label: Search / Finder (can open web)
categories.reason: Galaxy Finder integrates search; some parents remove to reduce web entry from launcher.

categories.label: Microsoft (Phone Link / Office stub)
categories.reason: Link to Windows / Office headless; optional on phones.

categories.label: Samsung Game features
categories.reason: Game Launcher / tools / optimization; remove if you do not use Samsung gaming features.

categories.label: AR / VR (Samsung)
categories.reason: AR Zone, AR Doodle, AR Emoji, Gear VR service, stickers — optional.

categories.label: Bixby
categories.reason: Bixby voice/UI pieces; some removals may need testing on your One UI version.

categories.label: ANT+ (fitness radios)
categories.reason: Remove only if you do not use ANT+ accessories (some Garmin / bike sensors).

categories.label: Google apps (optional)
categories.reason: Often kept for Gmail, Maps, Drive. Remove only if you use alternatives.

categories.label: Google Play Store
categories.reason: Removing blocks normal Play installs/updates; use Family Link to restrict instead.

categories.label: Parental / Family Link
categories.reason: Keep if you use Google Family Link on this device.
